stories.title: Fujitsu and leading Japanese robotics companies to use Nvidia technology in 'physical AI'
stories.simple_summary: Japanese robot companies are partnering with Nvidia (a computer chip maker) to build robots that move and interact with the real world using AI.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and engineers — unless you're in manufacturing or buy factory robots, you don't need to act on this.

stories.title: Top Microsoft Executives Replaced In Major AI Overhaul: Report
stories.simple_summary: Microsoft changed which executives lead its AI division.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to Microsoft employees and investors — no change for you or your small business.

stories.title: Anthropic CEO gives $1 million to super PAC amid battle of AI big-money groups
stories.simple_summary: The head of Anthropic (an AI company) gave $1 million to support political causes related to AI.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a political story, not something that affects your daily life or business.

stories.title: Europe Wants to Break Free From American and Chinese Technology. But How?
stories.simple_summary: Europe wants to build its own technology instead of relying only on American and Chinese companies.
stories.why_it_matters: If you buy European technology or software, this could mean more local options in the future, but no immediate action needed.

stories.title: Applied Computing wants to give oil and gas operators an AI model for the entire plant
stories.simple_summary: A company is using $20 million to build an AI tool specifically designed to help oil and gas plants run themselves better.
stories.why_it_matters: Unless you work in oil, gas, or petrochemicals, this doesn't affect you — this is a specialized tool for one industry.

stories.title: Alibaba and Baidu shares jump in Hong Kong on Apple AI partnership
stories.simple_summary: Stock prices for two Chinese companies (Alibaba and Baidu) went up because Apple announced it's working with them on AI.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to people who own these stocks — no impact on everyday life or small businesses.

stories.title: Microsoft is reportedly training salespeople to talk down OpenAI and Anthropic
stories.simple_summary: Microsoft is telling its salespeople to convince customers that Microsoft's AI is better and cheaper than competitors like OpenAI.
stories.why_it_matters: If your business uses AI tools, you might get pitched Microsoft's version — just compare options like you would any software.

stories.title: US hardens AI stance on China as Anthropic calls for extending lead
stories.simple_summary: The US government is stricter about which AI technology American companies can sell to China.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly affects large tech companies and investors — no change for typical small businesses.

stories.title: xAI sues a man for using Grok to generate CSAM ‘deepfakes’
stories.simple_summary: A company that owns an AI chatbot is suing a man who allegedly used it to create fake harmful images of children.
stories.why_it_matters: This shows companies are taking legal action when their tools are misused, but it doesn't change what you need to know about AI.

stories.title: AI slop movies are the new direct-to-video cash grabs
stories.simple_summary: Movies made cheaply with AI are being sold like old-fashioned low-budget movies — quick cash grabs that don't get theatrical releases.
stories.why_it_matters: You might encounter poor-quality AI-generated movies streaming online, but quality films still need real filmmakers.

stories.title: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI released a special keyboard for its coding AI tool while in a legal dispute with Apple about hardware.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a niche product for programmers — unless you're a coder, you won't need this keyboard.

stories.title: Mira Murati’s AI Startup Releases First Model in Bid to Loosen AI Giants’ Grip
stories.simple_summary: A former executive from OpenAI started her own AI company and released its first AI model to compete with bigger AI companies.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to tech investors and engineers — this is about industry competition, not something affecting your business.
